name: Resler Table Lamp - 25 Inch Height - TBL4377 - Brown/White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the resler 25 inch table lamp, an elegant addition that blends style with functionality. Crafted from 80 percent resin and 20 percent iron, this lamp showcases a harmonious brown and white color palette that complements any decor. The resin body offers a smooth finish while the iron neck adds a touch of sleek sophistication. Designed to be both a focal point and a subtle enhancer of ambience, the resler lamp stands as a testament to craftsmanship. Its classic design paired with modern materials creates a versatile piece that adds warmth and charm to any room. Whether placed on a bedside table or used as an accent in your living area, its presence is sure to invite a sense of tranquility and style.
